markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Hans Vanaken records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the USA vs Belgium professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 6, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the USA vs Belgium professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jul 6, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Hans Vanaken: 1+ goals
